calendar.matters:
Hearing On Request To Make Payments
Off Calendar Sep-28-2018 Granted Per Written Order

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-19-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar as regularly scheduled for trial de novo.

Appearances:
Appellant/Defendant Dark Nacre Atelier, LLC. present by Representative Dan Douglas, Director of Operations.
Respondent/Plaintiff Shobha Annie Philips present in pro per.
All parties stipulated to a judge pro-tem., and are sworn in open court.
Appellant and Respondent testifies on their own behalf, and responds to the questions from the Court with documentary evidence introduced.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission.
No additional evidence is retained by the Court.

JUDGE PRO TEM Robert J. Stumpt, Jr.; Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported. (525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Continued To Jul-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Judgment Entered
